detail.description: Adam Frazier singles on a line drive to right fielder Lawrence Butler.
Adam Frazier singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte.
Adam Frazier singles on a ground ball to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Logan O'Hoppe to 2nd.
Adam Frazier singles on a ground ball to shortstop Xander Bogaerts.
Adam Frazier triples (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Logan O'Hoppe scores.
Adam Frazier doubles (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Luke Raley.
Adam Frazier singles on a ground ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Jo Adell scores.
Adam Frazier singles on a line drive to right fielder Luke Raley. Logan O'Hoppe to 2nd.
Adam Frazier homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field.
Adam Frazier singles on a ground ball to left fielder Cody Bellinger.
Adam Frazier singles on a line drive to center fielder Trent Grisham.
Adam Frazier hits a ground-rule double (3) on a fly ball down the right-field line.
Adam Frazier doubles (2) on a fly ball to center fielder Lane Thomas. Josh Lowe scores. Travis d'Arnaud to 3rd.
Adam Frazier doubles (4) on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci.
Adam Frazier singles on a ground ball to right fielder Everson Pereira. Nolan Schanuel to 2nd.
Adam Frazier singles on a ground ball to center fielder TJ Friedl.
Adam Frazier doubles (5) on a line drive to right fielder Addison Barger. Bryce Teodosio scores. Nolan Schanuel to 3rd.
